name: bvdr
description: Custom Claude Code plugins for macOS productivity and development workflows

plugins.name: bvdr
plugins.description: Claude Code skills collection: Umami Analytics, Slack notifications, statusline setup, voice alerts, and more

plugins.name: bvdr-interactive-notifications
plugins.description: macOS interactive dialogs for Claude Code permissions and questions - respond from anywhere without switching to terminal

plugins.name: bvdr-smart-permissions
plugins.description: AI-powered permission hook that auto-approves safe operations and auto-denies dangerous ones

plugins.name: bvdr-nightshift
plugins.description: Autonomous deep codebase audit with 2-level swarm. 9 Level 1 audit domains + 6 Level 2 enhancement agents. Stop/resume, dashboard report, trend tracking, Slack/Notion integration.
